explicit_text: I was born in University Place, Nebraska, which at the time was a separate suburb. Later on, University Place was incorporated into Lincoln, so while I was originally from University Place, it is now considered part of Lincoln. My early years were shaped by growing up in that community before it became part of the larger city.
implicit_text: I was born in a suburb of Nebraska that was independent at the time. Later on, that suburb was incorporated into the nearby larger city, so while I was originally from the smaller community, it is now considered part of the bigger city. My early years were shaped by growing up in that community before it became part of the larger city.

explicit_text: Although I was born in University Place, that area was later incorporated into Lincoln, Nebraska. So, in a sense, I am from Lincoln, having grown up in what became part of the city. Lincoln has been the backdrop for much of my early life and memories, especially since University Place merged into it.
